title: Bridge Essay: Your brain on nature: A scoping review of the neuroscience of nature exposure.
concept: Nature connectedness — biophilia hypothesis, nature neuroscience, environmental neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nature connectedness — biophilia hypothesis, nature neuroscience, environmental neuroscience.

**Your brain on nature: A scoping review of the neuroscience of nature exposure.** - Neurosci Biobehav Rev (2026). DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2026.106565. PMID: 41547470. The relationship between natural environments and human cognition has gathered increasing attention across disciplines, including neuroscience, environmental psychology, and public health. An expanding body of empirical evidence supports the notion that exposure to nature consistently promotes psychological and physiological well-being.
